title: Notting Hill
synopsis: The life of a simple bookshop owner changes when he meets the most famous film star in the world. A charming romantic comedy set in the vibrant streets of London's Notting Hill neighborhood.

title: Harry Potter
synopsis: An orphaned boy discovers he is a wizard and is invited to study at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. A magical journey of friendship, courage, and the battle between good and evil.

title: Bridget Jones's Diary
synopsis: A British woman is determined to improve herself while she looks for love in a year in which she keeps a personal diary. A hilarious and heartfelt comedy about finding yourself.

title: Shakespeare in Love
synopsis: A young Shakespeare, out of ideas and short of cash, meets his ideal woman and is inspired to write one of his most famous plays. A witty and passionate period drama.

title: Friends
synopsis: Six young New Yorkers navigate the complexities of work, life, and love while hanging out at their favorite coffee place. The iconic sitcom that defined a generation.

title: Sleepless in Seattle
synopsis: A recently widowed man's son calls a radio talk show in an attempt to find his father a partner. A touching romance that spans the distance between two cities.

title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
synopsis: A young New York socialite becomes interested in a young man who has moved into her apartment building. A timeless classic about love, identity, and belonging.

title: When Harry Met Sally
synopsis: Harry and Sally have known each other for years, and are very good friends, but they fear sex would ruin the friendship. The quintessential New York romantic comedy.

title: Amelie
synopsis: Amelie is an innocent and naive girl in Paris with her own sense of justice. She decides to help those around her and discovers love along the way. A whimsical tale of Montmartre magic.

title: Before Sunset
synopsis: Nine years after Jesse and Celine first met, they encounter each other again on the streets of Paris. A beautifully intimate conversation unfolds in real time as they wander the city.

title: Star Wars: Episode II
synopsis: Ten years after initially meeting, Anakin Skywalker shares a forbidden romance with Padme Amidala, while Obi-Wan investigates an assassination attempt on the senator. An epic space saga.

title: The Grand Chase
synopsis: A globe-spanning chase propels a small crew through London, Paris, New York, and Seville as they race to keep a stolen artifact out of the wrong hands. Every city hides a clue, and every location becomes a trap.
